beginner.zh: 粉磨粗一点;缩短时间。口诀:苦调粗

advanced.zh: 调粗研磨/降水温1-2C/缩短时间/降粉量比;排查过萃
advanced.en: Coarser / drop temp 1-2C / shorter / lower ratio; check over-extraction

root_cause.zh: 碳水化合物过度溶出(过萃)

beginner.zh: 粉磨细一点;延长时间。口诀:酸调细

advanced.zh: 调细研磨/升水温/延长时间/提粉量比;排查欠萃
advanced.en: Finer / raise temp / longer / raise ratio; check under-extraction

root_cause.zh: 果酸类先溶出但糖类未充分萃取(欠萃)
root_cause.en: Acids extracted but sugars not yet (under-extraction)

beginner.zh: 粉磨细一点,或多放粉少放水
beginner.en: Grind finer, or more grounds less water

advanced.zh: 提高粉量、调细研磨、降低粉水比(1:15->1:14)

root_cause.zh: 萃取不足或粉水比过高

beginner.zh: 粉磨粗一点,或多放水少放粉
beginner.en: Grind coarser, or more water less grounds

advanced.zh: 降粉量、调粗研磨、提粉水比
调细研磨、提粉量、检查布粉均匀度

root_cause.zh: 研磨太粗或布粉不均致通道效应
root_cause.en: Too coarse or channeling from poor distribution

advanced.zh: 调粗研磨、减粉量、检查填压力度

root_cause.en: Too fine or too much dose

advanced.zh: 调粗研磨、降水温、排查通道效应与过萃
advanced.en: Coarser, lower temp, check channeling & over-extraction

root_cause.zh: 过萃或通道效应致高分子物质过度提取

advanced.zh: 提粉量、调细研磨、确认水温与新鲜度
advanced.en: More dose, finer, check temp & freshness

root_cause.zh: 萃取不足或豆子不新鲜
